title: Save My Tools
description: Simple client-side mod that prevents you from accidentally breaking your tools.
body:
# Save My Tools
Simple, lightweight mod that prevents you from breaking your tools (**works in multiplayer!**)

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc515688822a389965659424c3f76f454c60275f.png)](https://discord.gg/GTA4awvHfm)

## CLIENT-SIDE ONLY

## Features
- Prevents tools from breaking when:
  - Attacking entities
  - Mining blocks
  - Interacting with blocks (i.e. stripping logs, tilling land, creating path)
- You can override the warning by holding a keybind

## Required Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
